enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder, CO on April 10, 2018, recapping a day of working on his website (linking audio chapters of Gibbon's Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire to bike training time trials), running errands (haircut, sleeping suit, watch repair), and a lengthy stretching session he's enthusiastic about. He also mentions a knee issue keeping him off the bike and plans to run and swim the next day.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Highly beneficial — more bang for the buck than training alone; philosophy is squeezing muscles like wringing out a cloth to flush toxins
Fired up about linking Gibbon audiobook chapters to bike time trial durations, despite wasting half the day on a wrong approach
Should give it at least five days rest when the knee gets really bad

entities: Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire
